metadata.title: GarIQ — The smart logbook for your vehicles
metadata.description: Much more than an expense tracker: log with a photo, PDF, or chat (AI proposes, you confirm), ask your own data and documents, and analyze spend on a timeline and in statistics — even across currencies.
metadata.keywords: vehicle logbook,car maintenance,fuel tracker,AI car assistant,OCR receipt,vehicle documents,vehicle statistics,multi currency,AI garage

hero.title: Much more than an expense tracker — the brain of your garage.
hero.subtitle: Photo, PDF, or chat → AI drafts the entry and you confirm, every time. Then ask anything about your vehicles and documents — in your language. Fuel, service, insurance, taxes, inspections, EV charging, and expenses: all on a timeline and in statistics, even across currencies.
hero.stat1Copy: Form, photo, PDF, or chat — same review step every time.
hero.stat2Copy: Natural-language answers from your events and uploaded manuals.
hero.stat3Copy: Separate spaces for daily driver, family, or hobby vehicles.
hero.imageAlt: GarIQ app showing home, vehicles, timeline, and insert flow

notJustTracker.label: More than a tracker
notJustTracker.title: An expense app gives you numbers. GarIQ gives you the whole picture.
notJustTracker.copy: Expense trackers stop at what you paid. GarIQ connects spend, history, documents, and AI answers — across vehicles, garages, and currencies.

rows.old: Search and add up by hand
rows.new: Ask and AI answers from your data, with citations
Photo, PDF, or chat → AI draft → you confirm

problem.label: The problem
problem.title: Vehicle history falls apart when records live in five different places.
problem.copy: Receipts in your wallet, insurance PDFs in email, odometer notes in messages — you lose time, money, and peace of mind when something is due or you need a number for taxes.

cards.title: Scattered receipts
cards.copy: Fuel and maintenance slips disappear before you log them.

cards.title: Hard-to-find documents
cards.copy: Policies and manuals are buried in folders with useless file names.

cards.title: Guesswork on spend
cards.copy: “How much did I spend last year?” should not require a spreadsheet marathon.

cards.title: Shared vehicles, no shared log
cards.copy: Partners and family members lack one trusted history for the same car.

solution.label: The solution
solution.title: One logbook per vehicle — structured, searchable, and yours.
solution.copy: GarIQ keeps events, attachments, and document vault files under your account. Invite co-owners when you need help logging — without turning your garage into enterprise software.

cards.title: Garages that match real life
cards.copy: Daily commuter, weekend bike, or household cars — switch active garage on Home.

cards.title: You confirm every save
cards.copy: AI drafts from OCR or chat; you review the form, then tap Save. No autosave.

cards.title: Timeline & statistics
cards.copy: Year-grouped history and spend breakdowns for the vehicles you care about.

cards.title: Vault + Ask
cards.copy: Store manuals and policies; ask questions and get answers grounded in your files.

features.label: Features
features.title: Built for drivers who want accuracy without paperwork pain.

items.title: Event logging
items.copy: Refuel, charge, workshop, insurance, tax, inspection, expense, and notes.

items.title: Insert capture sheet
items.copy: Pick event type, then form, photo, PDF, or conversational chat to collect fields.

items.title: OCR from photos & PDFs
items.copy: Turn a station receipt or invoice into an editable draft in seconds.

items.title: Ask AI
items.copy: Questions about spend, history, and uploaded documents — answered from your data.

items.title: Document vault
items.copy: Owner manuals and insurance PDFs with semantic search and registration prefill.

items.title: Multi-garage
items.copy: Invite co-owners, admins, or loggers with roles — great for families.

items.title: Deadlines in the app
items.copy: Insurance expiry on the vehicle profile and dates on the timeline — no push alerts in v1.

items.title: Automatic multi-currency
items.copy: Pay abroad: GarIQ converts at the day's rate into your garage currency.

items.title: CSV export
items.copy: Export every event across all vehicles — your data stays yours.

items.title: Privacy by design
items.copy: Row-level security: you only see garages and vehicles you belong to.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.title: From sign-up to insight in five straightforward steps.

steps.title: Create your account
steps.copy: Sign up, confirm your email, and sign in on your phone.

steps.title: Add a vehicle
steps.copy: Make, model, fuel type, and optional photo — your garage starts here.

steps.title: Log an event
steps.copy: Use a form or let AI read a receipt — always review before saving.

steps.title: Upload documents & Ask
steps.copy: Store manuals or policies, then chat with your library when you need facts.

steps.title: Explore timeline & stats
steps.copy: Filter by year and vehicle to see spend and history at a glance.

walkthrough.label: Step by step
walkthrough.title: From a tank of fuel to a smart answer, in a few taps.

steps.title: Capture your way
steps.copy: Pick the event type, then photo, PDF, chat, or form. AI prepares a draft with amounts, liters, and dates — you review and confirm.
steps.alt: GarIQ screen: a fuel receipt photo turned into a draft with prefilled fields and a Confirm button.

steps.title: Everything on a timeline
steps.copy: Every confirmed event lands in your year-grouped history, with a type icon, cost, and date.
steps.alt: GarIQ screen: an event timeline grouped by year with icons and costs.

steps.title: Clear statistics
steps.copy: Spend by category, monthly trend, and vehicle comparison — filter by year and vehicle.
steps.alt: GarIQ screen: statistics with spend by category and a monthly chart.

steps.title: Ask your data
steps.copy: “How much on workshop in 2025?” or “recommended tire pressure?” — answers from your events and documents, with citations.
steps.alt: GarIQ screen: assistant chat with an answer and a citation from a PDF manual.

steps.title: Many garages, one app
steps.copy: Separate cars, bikes, and family into garages, with roles for who logs (co-owner, admin, logger).
steps.alt: GarIQ screen: multi-garage home with a vehicle carousel and active-garage switcher.

steps.title: Pay in any currency
steps.copy: Expenses abroad are converted automatically at the day's rate into your garage currency — no manual math.
steps.alt: GarIQ screen: event detail with a euro amount and automatic conversion from a foreign currency.

ai.label: AI layer
ai.title: AI that speeds up logging — without taking the wheel.
ai.copy: GarIQ uses vision OCR, conversational collection, and tool-based Ask. Every AI path ends on a draft you can edit; confirmed events power statistics and answers.

cards.title: Receipt & PDF OCR
cards.copy: Extract amounts, dates, and fuel details from images and documents.

cards.title: Chat collect
cards.copy: Describe maintenance or expenses in plain language; fill the draft when ready.

cards.title: Cited Ask
cards.copy: Answers on spend, history, and documents — from your data, citing the source file.

cards.title: In your language
cards.copy: The assistant replies in Italian, German, English, French, or Spanish.

stats.label: Statistics
stats.title: From scattered numbers to clear decisions.
stats.copy: Filter by year and vehicle: spend by category, monthly trend, and vehicle comparison — all in your garage currency.

cards.title: By category
cards.copy: See where the money really goes: workshop, fuel, insurance, and more.

cards.title: Monthly trend
cards.copy: Compare spend month by month and across years.

cards.title: By vehicle
cards.copy: Which vehicle costs most? Filter and compare in a tap.

useCases.label: Who it's for
useCases.title: One app, many garages — starting with real drivers.

items.title: Daily commuters
items.copy: Log fuel and tolls quickly; know monthly spend without opening Excel.

items.title: Families
items.copy: Share a garage, split logging duties, keep one timeline for the household car.

items.title: Enthusiasts
items.copy: Track maintenance on a classic or weekend vehicle in its own garage.

items.title: EV drivers
items.copy: Record charging sessions alongside traditional fuel events.

items.title: Document keepers
items.copy: Insurance PDFs and manuals searchable when you need a detail on the road.

scenarios.label: See it in action
scenarios.title: Real workflows GarIQ is built for — not fictional reviews.

items.title: Fuel receipt photo
items.copy: Snap the station receipt → OCR draft → adjust liters and price → Save → shows on Timeline and Stats.

items.title: Ask your spend
items.copy: “How much did I spend on refueling in 2025?” — answered from your logged events.

items.title: Owner manual PDF
items.copy: Upload to the document vault → Ask “What’s the recommended tire pressure?” — answer cites your file.

items.title: Maintenance via chat
items.copy: Choose Maintenance → Chat → describe the work → review draft → confirm.

items.title: Two garages
items.copy: “Daily driver” vs “Weekend motorcycle” — switch active garage on Home.

items.title: Insurance on file
items.copy: Upload policy → confirm expiry on the vehicle profile — visible in the app (no push in v1).

items.title: Refuel abroad
items.copy: Pay in CHF or USD → GarIQ converts at the day's rate into your garage currency.

plans.label: Plans & AI
plans.title: Four account tiers. Same app — scales with your garage.
plans.copy: Limits below match the live product (garages, vehicles, sharing, and monthly server AI usage). Plans are assigned to your account in the app — this page does not process payments. On Free, your monthly server AI period starts when you add your first vehicle.
plans.footnote: Monthly AI usage counts completion tokens for OCR, chat insert, and Ask (not document embeddings). On Free, scanning your registration before your first vehicle does not use the monthly cap; manual event forms stay available if you reach the limit. You always confirm before an event is saved.

tiers.name: Free
tiers.description: Start with forms and server AI after you add your first vehicle.
highlights: ~100K server AI tokens / month from your first vehicle
Registration scan before your first vehicle doesn't use the monthly cap

tiers.name: Basic
tiers.description: More vehicles and invite family to share one garage.
highlights: Photo, PDF, chat insert & Ask on server AI

tiers.name: Advanced
tiers.description: Multiple garages and higher AI headroom for active loggers.
highlights: Same AI features, higher monthly cap

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.description: Large garages and top AI headroom for teams and workshops.

download.label: Download
download.title: Get GarIQ on your phone
download.copy: Available on Android and iOS. Install, sign in, and add your first vehicle in minutes.
download.comingSoonHint: Store links will appear here as soon as GarIQ is published.

items.a: Fuel, charging, workshop, insurance, taxes, inspections, general expenses, and diary notes — all tied to a vehicle.
No. AI proposes a draft from OCR or chat; you edit and confirm on the draft screen before anything is stored.
Yes. Create separate garages and invite others with co-owner, admin, or logger roles.
Upload owner manuals, policies, and related PDFs to the vehicle document vault; Ask can search them with citations.

items.q: Will I get push reminders for deadlines?
items.a: Not in v1. Insurance expiry and note follow-up dates are visible in the app — there are no push notifications yet.
The mobile app UI is English in v1. This marketing site is available in English, German, and Italian.
GarIQ uses Supabase with row-level security so you only access garages and vehicles you belong to.

items.q: Which currencies can I log expenses in?
items.a: You can pay in a currency other than your garage's: GarIQ fetches the day's rate and converts automatically, with no manual override.

items.q: What language does the AI answer in?
items.a: Choose the assistant language in Settings: Italian, German, English, French, or Spanish.
Yes. Export every event across all vehicles as CSV from Settings — your data stays yours.

items.q: How do plans and AI work?
items.a: Plans are managed in the app and include a monthly server AI allowance — details appear in Settings, and this page does not process payments. On Free, the monthly cap starts with your first vehicle; registration scan before that is unlimited, and you can still log events manually if you hit the limit.

finalCta.title: Stop losing receipts. Start a logbook you'll actually trust.
finalCta.copy: Download GarIQ, add your vehicle, and log your next tank of fuel or service visit — with AI help and human confirmation.

welcome.metaDescription: Your GarIQ signup is complete and your email address is confirmed.
welcome.title: Signup complete
welcome.lead: Your GarIQ account is active and your email address has been verified. Return to the app on your phone to sign in and get started.
welcome.step1: Open GarIQ on the device where you signed up.
welcome.step2: Sign in with the same email and password you used to register.
welcome.step3: Add your first vehicle from Home or Vehicles to unlock timeline, statistics, and logging.
welcome.benefit1: Log fuel, maintenance, and more — by form, photo, PDF, or chat. You review and confirm every entry.
welcome.benefit2: Browse a year-grouped timeline and cost statistics for your vehicles.
welcome.benefit3: Keep documents in your vault and Ask questions based on your own data.

signup.title: Signup complete
signup.lead: Your GarIQ account is active and your email address has been verified. Return to the app on your phone to sign in and get started.
signup.step1: Open GarIQ on the device where you signed up.
signup.step2: Sign in with the same email and password you used to register.
signup.step3: Add your first vehicle from Home or Vehicles to unlock timeline, statistics, and logging.
signup.benefit1: Log fuel, maintenance, and more — by form, photo, PDF, or chat. You review and confirm every entry.
signup.benefit2: Browse a year-grouped timeline and cost statistics for your vehicles.
signup.benefit3: Keep documents in your vault and Ask questions based on your own data.

recovery.title: Password reset link confirmed
recovery.body: This link was opened in the browser. To set a new password, open GarIQ on the phone where you requested the reset and follow the in-app steps.

invite.title: Garage invitation
invite.body: Someone shared a GarIQ garage with you. Open GarIQ on your phone and sign in to accept the invitation.

emailChange.title: Email address updated
emailChange.body: Your GarIQ email change was confirmed. Open the app on your phone and sign in to continue.

error.title: Link could not be completed
error.bodyFallback: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new confirmation or reset email from the GarIQ app if you still need access.
